landing.eyebrow: Ojulowo. Ti a le ṣayẹwo. Ti a ko le yi pada.
landing.title: Pẹpẹ akọkọ ti Naijiria fun awọn abajade idibo ti o da lori iwe.
landing.lede: A kọ́ ọ lori Fọọmu EC8A. Awọn ẹgbẹ́ awujọ alagbada ni o ń ṣakoso rẹ. O n jẹ́ jiyin si gbogbo eniyan.
landing.feature1_body: Awọn abajade farahan nigbati awọn ẹgbẹ ominira ati awọn alabojuto ba gbagbọ.
landing.feature2_body: Gbogbo nọmba ti a tẹjade ni a fihan pẹlu EC8A ti a ti fọwọsi.
landing.feature3_body: Gbogbo aworan ni a fi SHA-256 ṣe, gbogbo iṣẹlẹ ni a so pọ, ati Merkle roots ni a fi sori blockchain.

agent.phone_lede: Tẹ nọmba foonu ti o forukọsilẹ pẹlu ẹgbẹ rẹ.
agent.otp_lede: A fi koodu oni nọmba 6 ranṣẹ si {phone}.
agent.pu_footnote: Iwọ yoo fi aworan ranṣẹ fun aaye idibo yi nikan. Ti o ba nilo iyipada, kan si alabojuto ẹgbẹ rẹ.
agent.pu_no_elections: Ko si idibo ti n ṣiṣẹ. Kan si alabojuto ẹgbẹ rẹ.
agent.capture_lede: Ya aworan gbogbo EC8A. Rii daju pe awọn igun mẹrin han ati awọn ibuwọlu han kedere.
agent.confirm_offline_note: Ti o ko ba si lori ayelujara, yoo gbe lọ laifọwọyi nigbati intanẹẹti ba pada.
agent.done_status_submitting: Ti firanṣẹ. N duro de ifẹsẹmulẹ…
agent.done_status_queued: Ti firanṣẹ. N duro de oṣiṣẹ isediwon…
agent.done_queue_remaining_one: Iforukọsilẹ 1 tun wa ninu laini ailopin.
agent.done_queue_remaining_many: Iforukọsilẹ {n} tun wa ninu laini ailopin.
agent.drain_accepted: Ti firanṣẹ. N duro de isediwon…
agent.queue_discard_confirm: Jubẹ iforukọsilẹ yi? Aworan naa yoo padanu.
agent.err_phone_throttled: Awọn ibeere koodu pọ ju fun nọmba yii.
agent.err_ip_throttled: Awọn ibeere koodu pọ ju lati nẹtiwọki yii.
agent.err_no_active_otp: Ko si koodu ti n ṣiṣẹ fun nọmba yii. Beere fun tuntun.
agent.err_expired: Koodu naa ti pari. Beere fun tuntun.
agent.err_too_many_attempts: Awọn igbiyanju aṣiṣe pọ ju. Beere fun koodu tuntun.
agent.err_phone_not_provisioned: A ko forukọsilẹ nọmba yii. Kan si alabojuto ẹgbẹ rẹ.
agent.err_device_change_required: A ṣe akiyesi ẹrọ tuntun. Alabojuto rẹ gbọdọ fọwọsi.
agent.err_no_pu_assigned: Ko si aaye idibo ti a fi fun ọ.
agent.err_generic: Nkan kan ko tọ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
